synopsis: The Dark Lord finally comes face-to-face with Skakoan revolutionary Jul Tambor, and Sabé finally must pick sides! Is Jul just another selfish, revenge-driven monster? Or is he a freedom fighter who desperately cares about his people? Or both? And is Vader more interested in crushing Jul, or completing the co-option of the Handmaidens of Padmé Amidala?
title: Darth Vader (2020) #31
